title: A2 Chemistry
intro: Start with physical chemistry, transition elements, and the core A2 organic set.

routes.title: Physical & Transition
routes.description: Start here for electrochemistry, buffers, redox, catalysis, and transition elements.

routes.title: Arenes & Phenol
routes.description: Use this route for arenes, halogenoarenes, phenol, and aromatic reactions.

routes.title: Acyl, Nitrogen & Comparisons
routes.description: Use this route for acyl chemistry, amines, amides, amino acids, polymers, and comparison notes on acidity and basicity.
